title: Ancient Cache
desc: A buried Mugic-sealed cache from an early expedition was detected.

steps.text: Beneath three metres of sediment, your deep scanner confirms a sealed Mugic cache — inscribed with markings from all four tribes. A joint expedition, ancient. It has never been opened.
The cache releases a Mugic pulse when unsealed, drawing two creature signals to your position. The contents are visible — rare fragments — but you have ninety seconds before they arrive.

options.label: Grab what you can and extract
Stand ground and fight for the full cache
Set a Mugic trap and hold your position
